# IVCAP Client SDK (Python)

> Python SDK for interacting with IVCAP deployments — discover services, run jobs, manage artifacts and metadata

ivcap_client is a Python SDK for interacting with IVCAP
(Intelligent Visual Computing and Analytics Platform) deployments.
Use it to discover services, submit jobs, manage artifacts, read/write
Aspects in the DataFabric, and orchestrate multi-agent pipelines.
All list methods return iterators; authentication is via JWT token or environment variables.


## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/getting-started/installation/index.md)
- [Quick Start](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/getting-started/quick-start/index.md)
- [Authentication](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/getting-started/authentication/index.md)

- [Error Handling](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/guides/error-handling/index.md)

- [IVCAP Client](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/ivcap/index.md)
- [Service](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/service/index.md)
- [Job](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/job/index.md)
- [Artifact](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/artifact/index.md)
- [Aspect](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/aspect/index.md)
- [Exceptions](https://ivcap-works.github.io/ivcap-client-sdk-python/api/exceptions/index.md)
